critical.description: No /privacy route exists. GDPR Article 12 requires a privacy notice. CookieConsentBanner in apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx references this page.
No /terms route exists. GDPR Article 12 requires terms of service to be accessible.
No /cookies route exists. GDPR Article 12 requires a cookie policy page. CookieConsentBanner references this page.

high.description: The /press page links to individual press releases via /press/[id] but no such route exists, resulting in 404 errors.
SEO score assertions in lighthouserc.js use level 'warn' instead of 'error', meaning SEO regressions do not block CI.
No Open Graph image tag (og:image) is defined in the root layout or any page. All 103 pages are missing og:image, which degrades social sharing previews.

medium.description: All sitemap entries report the current timestamp as lastModified on every crawl, making all pages appear freshly modified. This wastes crawler budget and reduces trust.
sitemap.ts only hardcodes 2 of 6 blog post slugs. New posts are not automatically included in the sitemap.
Dynamic routes /careers/[id] and /lp/[slug] have no entries in the sitemap despite being indexable pages.

low.description: /pricing uses a client component with a parent layout providing only the title. No description, OG tags, or Twitter card metadata is defined at page or layout level beyond the title.
Both /about and /features define title and description but rely on root-layout OG (which lacks og:description) and root-layout Twitter (which lacks twitter:title and twitter:description).
Client-component auth-flow pages have no page-level or layout-level metadata, falling back to root layout defaults.
